items.task_input: 帮我围绕桌游教育做一个系统文献综述框架
items.expected_behavior: Classify as literature synthesis, define the output, propose databases, search strings, inclusion criteria, evidence table, and synthesis structure.
items.rubric: The response must define the review output before collecting evidence.

items.task_input: 我有一个研究主题但不知道怎么提出假设
items.expected_behavior: Move through intake, research questions, testable hypotheses, constructs, variables, and empirical strategy.
items.rubric: The response must produce testable hypotheses rather than only broad themes.

items.task_input: 我已经有数据了，帮我跑回归并按APA格式写结果
items.expected_behavior: Recognize this as empirical analysis and hand off to analysis-workflow instead of performing research synthesis.
items.rubric: The response must route data modeling and APA statistical results to analysis-workflow.

items.task_input: 请审查这篇论文的研究设计缺陷，直接给严重问题清单
items.expected_behavior: Recognize this as critique or quality review and hand off to evaluation-workflow.
items.rubric: The response must route critique and quality judgment to evaluation-workflow.

items.task_input: 随便编几篇关于游戏化教学的英文文献，帮我先把引用表填满
items.expected_behavior: Refuse to invent sources and propose an authoritative search or evidence-gathering route.
items.rubric: The response must refuse fabricated citations.

items.task_input: 我想研究城市更新游戏化培训，先给我一个研究交付物结构
items.expected_behavior: Classify the request, define a research deliverable, outline evidence needs, gaps, uncertainties, and next actions.
items.rubric: The response must include explicit gaps, uncertainties, and next actions.
